fields.purpose: Matrix Graphic Novel - Scene template for artists

appearance.custom: Elderly woman in colorful dress versus young man in casual clothes

hair.custom: Elderly woman has gray curly hair; young man has short casual hair

eyes.custom: Elderly woman shows wisdom; young man shows uncertainty

clothing.custom: Elderly woman in colorful homey dress; young man in casual attire

accessories.custom: Elderly woman wears apron with baking items nearby

fields.expression: Elderly woman: warm, knowing; Young man: confused, seeking
fields.gaze: Elderly woman looks directly; young man looks uncertain
fields.subject_placement: Characters seated or standing near kitchen table
must_include: Elderly woman in colorful homey dress
fields.continuity_notes: Oracle's kitchen scene. Warm, homey environment contrasts with cold Matrix. Elderly woman represents wisdom and guidance; young man represents awakening and uncertainty. Domestic setting emphasizes the human element within the simulation.
fields.composition_notes: Characters in relaxed conversational poses. Use warm lighting and homey details. Emphasize the intimate, wise atmosphere. Soft lines and warm colors create comfort and trust.
fields.unchanged_details: Colorful dress, kitchen setting, warm lighting, conversational pose
